basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Project Scientist, Junior Project Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.post_name: Senior Project Scientist, Junior Project Assistant and More
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Sr. Project Scientist / Project Scientist / Jr. Project Assistant (Tech.) Notification 2026 has been released on 28 April 2026 on the official website https://home.iitd.ac.in. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist / Project Scientist / Jr. Project Assistant (Tech.) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech, M.Sc, 1st class B.Tech. in EE/ECE, 1st class B.Tech.
qualification.details: Sr. Project Scientist: Essential: 1st class M.Tech. or M.Sc. (with three years of relevant experience) in a relevant subject and experience in Semiconductor Devices, hands-on experience on device fabrication including lithography and metallization. Preferable: PhD (thesis submitted is acceptable), Experience in Frequency domain THz measurements. Sr. Project Scientist: Essential: 1st class M.Tech. or M.Sc. (with three years of relevant experience) in a relevant subject and experience in Semiconductor Devices, hands-on experience on device fabrication including lithography and metallization. Preferable: PhD (thesis submitted is acceptable), EBL/ nano lithography, Magnetic device fabrication, characterization. Sr. Project Scientist: Essential: 1st class M.Tech. or M.Sc. (with three years of relevant experience) in a relevant subject and experience in Semiconductor Devices, hands-on experience on device fabrication. Preferable: PhD (thesis submitted is acceptable), RF device simulation and measurements. Project Scientist: Essential: 1st class B.Tech. in EE/ECE with mastery of CMOS Analog and RF circuit design. Preferable: Knowledge of Cadence Virtuoso. Project Scientist: Essential: 1st class B.Tech. in Electronics or equivalent, M.Tech. strongly preferred. Experience in 3DEM simulation, design of mm-wave circuits and design of waveguide components desirable. Jr. Project Assistant (Tech.): Diploma (3 years duration)/ Graduate Degree in an appropriate discipline OR ITI (2 years duration) in a relevant trade with 6 years relevant work experience. Basic knowledge of semiconductor lab processes, equipment and materials desirable.

selection_process: Short-listing of eligible candidates Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Delhi recruitment is 12th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Sr. Project Scientist posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Sr. Project Scientist position in this IIT Delhi recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for IIT Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the Jr. Project Assistant (Tech.) post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Jr. Project Assistant (Tech.) post ranges from Rs. 29,290 to Rs. 79,260 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification for the Project Scientist post in EE/ECE?
faq.answer: The essential qualification for the Project Scientist post in EE/ECE is a 1st class B.Tech. degree with mastery of CMOS Analog and RF circuit design.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves short-listing of eligible candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website for more information?
faq.answer: You can find more information on the official website of IIT Delhi's Research & Development (IRD) at http://ird.iitd.ac.in.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation mentioned for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify age relaxation details. Please refer to the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the project duration mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: The project duration is mentioned to be up to 20th March 2028.
